arts.ttl: 'I cried for hours over Man Utd and Real Madrid deal collapsing – it cost me big'
arts.sum: A Real Madrid legend has revealed how he was on the verge of joining Manchester United but was later left in tears when his move to the Premier League powerhouse collapsed

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye Ronald Araujo but there's a catch for star who rejected two rivals
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keen on signing Barcelona defender Ronald Araujo, who has previously turned down offers from rivals Liverpool and Chelsea. Araujo's decision to turn down a move to the Premier League in 2022, despite lucrative offers from both Liverpool and Chelsea, will certainly endear him to the Gunners' fans if a transfer does go ahead.

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Arsenal in FA Cup fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, George Smith, Steven Railston)
arts.sum: Man United will play Arsenal in the FA Cup this weekend and our writers have shared their preferred starting line ups.

arts.ttl: 'They are fighting' - Ruben Amorim warns nobody in Manchester United's dressing room is safe
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim was in good form when speaking at his press conference ahead of facing Arsenal in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: I left Manchester United and won two FA Cups with Arsenal - I haunted them in the process
arts.sum: Danny Welbeck left Man United in September 2014 and came back to haunt them just a few months later en route to winning his first of two FA Cups with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Manchester United transfer latest: Zlatan Ibrahimovic gives Marcus Rashford update as AC Milan interest intensifies
arts.sum: Zlatan Ibrahimovic provides an update about the possibility of Marcus Rashford switching from Manchester United to AC Milan, as Ruben Amorim seeks to move the forward on.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford sent warning shot over dream move as Barcelona boss puts foot down
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is keen on a move to Barcelona as he looks to leave Manchester United, but the La Liga side's manager Hansi Flick has made a decision that may make him reconsider

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Manchester United: Best bets for Sunday’s FA Cup games on BBC and ITV
arts.sum: Our betting expert with tips for the Emirates, Tamworth against Tottenham, and the Newcastle and Southampton clashes PLUS a Serie A angle

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Tottenham in the race to sign Randal Kolo Muani with striker’s future undecided
arts.sum: According to Fabrice Hawkins, Paris Saint-Germain forward Randal Kolo Muani (26) is attracting the interest of several clubs around the continent ahead of a potential move in the winter transfer window.…

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim urged to brutally axe Man Utd star who spoke out over 'leaders' claim
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a rollercoaster season under Erik ten Hag and then Ruben Amorim and the Red Devils boss has been told to stop playing one star in particular
